title: Auto Connect To Multiplayer Server
description: Automatically connect user to server when "Multiplayer" is pressed.
body:
## ✨ Auto Connect To Multiplayer Server ✨

### A Fabric Mod by t6200

Tired of manually selecting your favorite server every time you launch Minecraft? **Auto Connect To Multiplayer Server** is the essential Fabric utility designed to get you straight into the game with a single click.

If you have a primary server you always play on, this mod ensures you connect immediately, skipping the selection screen entirely!

### Why you'll love this mod

This mod is perfect for players who frequent a handful of dedicated multiplayer servers. It streamlines your game launch flow, making your main server instantly accessible and minimizing menu time.

### Key Features for a Seamless Experience

* **One-Click Launch:** Simply click the "Multiplayer" button on the title screen to instantly connect to your top-most server.
* **Intuitive Recovery:** If a connection fails or the server is down, pressing **Cancel** on the connecting screen gracefully returns you to the server list, allowing you to easily update the address or select an alternative.
* **Quick Re-Entry:** After disconnecting from a server, you are returned directly to the Multiplayer Server Selection screen, making it fast and easy to jump back in or switch worlds.
* **Clean & Lightweight:** A simple, client-side mod built on Fabric, designed for maximum compatibility and zero performance overhead.

### Installation Requirements

* Minecraft
* Fabric Loader & API

**Minimize menus, maximize playtime!**
